name: Security Issue
about: Report a security vulnerability (please do NOT post publicly)
title: "[SECURITY] "

---

## ⚠️ SECURITY NOTICE

**Please do not discuss security vulnerabilities publicly. If you found a security issue, report it privately to [security@lockstep.app](mailto:security@lockstep.app) instead.**

This template is only for tracking known security issues after they've been reported and patched.

---

## Vulnerability Description
Brief description of the security issue.

## Affected Component
What part of the app is affected? (e.g., authentication, payments, voice data)

## Severity
- [ ] Critical - Immediate action required
- [ ] High - Needs urgent attention
- [ ] Medium - Should be addressed soon
- [ ] Low - Can be addressed in regular updates

## Impact
What could an attacker or malicious user do with this vulnerability?

## Remediation
What steps have been or should be taken to fix this?
